Despite the rain, athletes from across the country persisted on the third day of events at the AAU Junior Olympics.

11 and 12-year-olds competed in the 3000m finals, while a handful of field events across multiple age groups awarded gold medals.

The 2024 Junior Olympics Track and Field competition isstreaming live on FloTrack, MileSplit and the FloSports app.Highlights, replays and breaking news are on both platforms.

Don't miss all the track and field season action streaming on FloTrack.Check out the FloTrack schedule for more events.

Video footage from each event will be archived and stored in a video library for FloTrack subscribers to watch for the duration of their subscriptions.
